subject: Galarian Farfetch'd, a dark-feathered duck-like Pokemon brandishing a large thick leek stalk like a weapon, standing in an open grassy field
description: A stout dark-feathered duck-like Pokemon stands in a sun-lit grassy field, gripping an oversized thick leek stalk that it holds like a fighting weapon. Its feathers are a deep brown-black with yellow markings on the face and body. It faces slightly to the right with a determined, intense expression. The background is a warm amber-golden field under a bright sky, giving the scene a calm rural atmosphere despite the creature's combat-ready posture. The thick leek stalk, much larger than the standard version, emphasizes the Galarian regional adaptation noted in the flavor text.
foreground: Galarian Farfetch'd gripping an oversized leek stalk in a combative stance
background: Open grassy field with warm amber and golden tones under bright sky
